sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel data documented for NES version

special_mechanics.name: Flight/Wing Flapping
special_mechanics.description: Player controls ostrich flight by pressing button to flap wings. Rate of button presses determines ascension: rapid presses fly upward, moderate presses hover, minimal presses slowly descend. Continuous control over vertical movement without discrete jump states.

special_mechanics.name: Joust Combat
special_mechanics.description: Collision-based combat where higher lance position wins. Equal height collisions repel both characters apart horizontally. Victory converts enemy into egg that falls to bottom of screen.

special_mechanics.name: Screen Wrapping
special_mechanics.description: Character traveling off-screen to either side reappears from opposite side, maintaining trajectory.

special_mechanics.name: Lava Hazard
special_mechanics.description: Indestructible Lava Troll grabs characters flying too low over lava, dragging them into lava and causing loss of life.

tier_notes: Tier 3 - Empirical/Qualitative. No specific physics values documented in available sources. Game mechanics are described qualitatively emphasizing button-press-based flight control and collision-based combat. NES version is a port of 1982 arcade original programmed by HAL Laboratory (notable for being early work by Satoru Iwata). Technical specifications based on arcade hardware reuse (Defender hardware) rather than NES-specific implementation details.
